title: Premium Editorial Travel Collage Poster AI
sourceTitle: Premium Editorial Travel Collage Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Stylized premium editorial travel collage poster for ALGERIA, built around a fashionable international tourist and destination-specific landmarks. Subject: A globally stylish visitor in modern travel attire appears visually distinct as a tourist, carrying camera, backpack, sunglasses, map, or suitcase while exploring ALGERIA. Scene: The collage surrounds the tourist with Sahara dunes, Algiers white architecture, Roman ruins, and Mediterranean coastline, local streets, transport, cuisine, signage, cultural details, and destination-specific visual motifs. Composition: Bold print-ready poster layout: central tourist figure, layered landmark collage, strong geometric shapes, balanced editorial hierarchy, torn paper edges, sticker accents, and clear room for the headline. Signature Elements: Preserved premium editorial travel collage poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Realistic character rendering blended with graphic travel-collage design, layered paper texture, halftone dots, premium editorial art direction, and modern tourism-poster polish. Color Palette: Destination-inspired color accents balanced with paper neutrals, print texture, graphic shapes, and premium editorial contrast. Typography: VISIT ALGERIA appears as the large legible headline integrated into the collage; smaller destination signage stays plausible and secondary. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Scene: The collage surrounds the tourist with Sahara dunes, Algiers white architecture, Roman ruins, and Mediterranean coastline, local streets, transport, cuisine, signage, cultural details, and destination-specific visual motifs. Composition: Bold print-ready poster layout: central tourist figure, layered landmark collage, strong geometric shapes, balanced editorial hierarchy, torn paper edges, sticker accents, and clear room for the headline. Signature Elements: Preserved premium editorial travel collage poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.
